message:
fix(ui): remove cookie/install prompts and fix BottomSheet touch issues

Critical fixes:
- Remove CookieConsentManager completely (user request)
- Remove InstallPrompt/PWA popup completely (user request)
- Fix BottomSheet dragConstraints (was {{ top: 0, bottom: 0 }} = zero movement)
- Fix BottomSheet positioning (use fixed instead of absolute)
- Add iOS safe area padding to BottomSheet
- Add proper touch handling with dragDirectionLock
- Increase drag handle touch target size
- Remove dead toggle-basket event listener from Nav

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
